description_long: This is a rectangular, upright juice carton labeled 'FARAGELLO GOLD' and 'PREMIUM MANGO NECTAR' on a white background with gold accents. The front features a realistic illustration of a ripe mango with a green leaf, visually indicating the flavor. The top of the carton is fitted with a white screw cap for pouring, set on a gold-colored panel. One side displays detailed nutritional information and product details in multiple languages, while the other side repeats the brand name vertically. The packaging is made of laminated paperboard, likely with an inner foil or plastic lining to preserve freshness, and is designed to hold 1 liter of juice. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and visually appealing, suitable for display in urban retail environments.
description: A white and gold rectangular juice carton labeled 'FARAGELLO GOLD' with a mango illustration and a white screw cap. The packaging is sleek, modern, and designed to hold 1 liter of mango nectar.
description_view_0: Side view showing the vertical 'FARAGELLO' branding and part of the nutrition facts panel.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the 'FARAGELLO GOLD' label, mango illustration, and product details.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with vertical 'FARAGELLO' branding and gold panel, less text visible.
description_view_3: Back view featuring the full nutrition facts panel and product information in multiple languages.
